description_long: This is an elegant porcelain teapot set accompanied by a matching teacup and saucer. The teapot features a tall, slightly tapered cylindrical body with a wide, angular handle and a straight spout, both accented in blue. A gold band encircles the upper portion of the teapot, complemented by a delicate blue floral motif just below the lid. The lid is domed with a small, round gold knob at the top, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. The teacup and saucer mirror the teapot's design, with gold rims and matching blue floral patterns, creating a cohesive and refined appearance. The overall finish is glossy, with smooth surfaces and crisp, clean lines.
description: A refined porcelain teapot set with blue and gold accents, featuring a tall teapot, matching teacup, and saucer adorned with delicate blue floral motifs and glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: The teapot is shown with its spout and handle clearly visible, alongside the matching teacup and saucer, highlighting the blue and gold decorative bands.
description_view_1: Rear view of the teapot, focusing on the angular blue handle and the gold-banded lid, with the teacup partially obscured.
description_view_2: The teapot is rotated to display the spout and handle from the opposite side, with the teacup and saucer positioned to the right.
description_view_3: Direct back view of the teapot, showing the handle centered and the teacup and saucer placed directly in front, emphasizing the symmetry of the set.
attribute_spout_orientation: Straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned at the front of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Angular, geometric handle with a rectangular cross-section, attached at the top and bottom of the teapot's side, colored blue for visual contrast.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a small round gold knob, fits snugly into the teapot opening.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Blue floral motifs encircle the upper body of the teapot and teacup, with gold bands and rims accentuating the edges.
